creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Which version of libimobiledevice are you trying to build?

This seems to have already been fixed upstream in April [1] and the current port (version 1.3.0.241) is based on the most recent upstream git commit as of writing. These changes were not merged into the quarterly branch, however.

[1] https://github.com/libimobiledevice/libimobiledevice/pull/1561
